mnemonics.title: Type 1 vs Type 2: BH
mnemonics.content: Type 1 = Bare-metal (directly on Hardware), Type 2 = Has a Host OS underneath. Remember: 1 = directly on hardware (1 layer), 2 = two layers (host OS + hypervisor).

mnemonics.title: VM Benefits: ICSST-L
mnemonics.content: Remember 'ICSST-L' for VM benefits: I = Isolation, C = Consolidation, S = Security/Sandboxing, S = Snapshots, T = Testing, L = Live migration.

mnemonics.title: Type 1 Examples: EHX-K
mnemonics.content: Remember 'EHX-K' for Type 1 hypervisors: E = ESXi (VMware), H = Hyper-V (Microsoft), X = Xen, K = KVM (Linux).
